## Avenia Aventura, Luxury Waterfront Living by Fendi Casa

Avenia Aventura is an exclusive collection of 22 luxury residences designed by Kobi Karp with interiors curated by Fendi Casa, blending Italian craftsmanship with modern elegance. Located on a serene canal in Aventura, the 15-story boutique tower offers 3-4 bedroom residences around 3,500 sq. ft., starting at $5M, with delivery in 2027. Amenities include rooftop swimming, dining, and lounging, as well as wellness and social spaces, all overlooking the Turnberry Isle Country Club. Avenia redefines upscale living with its sophisticated design and prime location, offering easy access to Miami, Sunny Isles, and Fort Lauderdale.

## Distinctly Modern Living with Signature Style

Situated on a serene canal in the heart of Aventura, Avenia is where high design meets savoir-faire, for a new living experience that comes to life with precision, glamor and a splash of the unexpected.

web.markdown:
Distinctly Modern Living

with Signature Style

## An exclusive collection of 22 waterfront residences   with Interiors by FENDI Casa.

Avenia brings Italian savoir-faire and refined glamour to the heart of Aventura. Each residence is envisioned as a statement of elevated waterfront living, curated with bespoke interiors by FENDI Casa and a palette that reflects timeless Italian elegance. Here, design, craftsmanship, and panoramic marina views converge to create a lifestyle that is both sophisticated and effortlessly serene.

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/rendering-2_touched-2.jpg)

Beauty finds its purpose in objects with the highest craftsmanship.

— Silvia Venturi Fendi

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/screenshot-2024-08-06-at-12-37-51-pm.jpg)

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/screenshot-2024-08-06-at-12-38-28-pm.jpg)

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/19-d_45_0m4a8877.jpg)

## The Vision

A private collection of 22 residences

Interiors by FENDI Casa

Two exclusive half-floor Penthouses with private rooftop

Three levels of lifestyle amenities

Rooftop for swimming, dining and lounging

Elegant wellness and social experiences

[Learn More](https://aveniaaventura.com/vision/)

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/dining-area.jpg)

Dining Room

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/dining-kitchen-1.jpg)

Dining Room with Open-Concept Kitchen

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/master-bedroom-2.jpg)

Primary Bedroom

- 1
- 2
- 3

## The Residences

Our residences feature gracious three- and four-bedroom floor plans, with only two homes per floor, offering unmatched privacy and exclusivity. Sunlit interiors are framed by serene views of the city, water, and golf course, complemented by a private terrace that seamlessly connects indoor and outdoor living.

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/screenshot-2024-08-06-at-1-25.jpg)

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/balcony-view-2-2.jpg)

## FEATURES

Expansive floor plans with north/south exposure

Private elevator lobby for each residence

10-foot ceilings throughout, 13-foot ceilings in Penthouses

Stylish Italian kitchens with quartz countertops

SubZero and Wolf appliance suite

Graciously appointed Primary Suite with walk-in closets featuring built-in fixtures

Walk-in closets with built-in details in primary suite

Laundry room with full-size washer and dryer

Integrated smart home technology

Designer bathroom faucets and fixtures

Pre-wired for WiFi and motorized window shades

Flexible space for a home office or den

Dedicated service quarters

[Explore The Residences](https://aveniaaventura.com/residences/)

## The Experience

Inspired by the elegance of European boulevards and more than three decades of architectural mastery, these residences are complemented by an elevated collection of curated, resort-style amenities.

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/summer-kitchen-3.jpg)

## AMENITIES

24/7 Concierge and Valet Services

Pet-Friendly Community

Rooftop Pool with Dining and Lounge Areas

Private Marina with 14 Slips

Elegant Wellness and Social Spaces

State-of-the-Art Gym and Fitness Center

Spa Featuring Sauna, Steam Room, and Cold Plunge

Games Lounge with Card Tables, Billiards, and More

Screening Room with Luxury Seating

Golf Simulator Lounge

Private Resident Library

[Explore Amenities](https://aveniaaventura.com/amenities/)

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/screenshot-2024-08-06-at-1-26-32-pm-2.jpg)

## The Neighborhood

Nestled amid two championship golf courses, Avenia is ideally positioned at the confluence of tranquil waterways and a vibrant cityscape – where natural beauty, cultural richness, and modern luxury converge to create an unparalleled lifestyle.

![](https://aveniaaventura.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/2025_01_08_neighborhood_map_ok-1.png)

[Discover aventura](https://aveniaaventura.com/location/)

Avenia brings together world-class visionaries in architecture, interiors, landscape, and lifestyle, elevating Aventura living to new heights.
